$comment: Schema for all story JSON files in /data/stories/. Every story file must validate against this structure.

id.description: Unique project id. Must match the filename (without .json).

title.description: Human-readable project title shown on the completion screen.

xpReward.description: XP awarded when the project reaches any ending.

scenes.description: Ordered list of all scenes. The first scene is the entry point.

id.description: Unique scene id within this project, e.g. 't_01'.

location.description: Key from config.json locations object, e.g. 'buero'.

locationEmoji.description: Override emoji for this scene. Falls back to config.json location emoji.

locationName.description: Override display name. Falls back to config.json location name.

npc.description: NPC id from npcs.json, or null for no NPC.

text.description: Main story text displayed to the player. No HTML — plain text only.

mood.description: Emotional tone of the scene, used for future theming.

id.description: Unique choice id within the scene, e.g. 'c1'.

text.description: Label shown on the choice button.

effects.description: Stat deltas applied when this choice is made. Positive = increase, negative = decrease.

flags.description: Story flags set when this choice is made, e.g. { 'met_dieter': true }.

next.description: Id of the next scene, or one of the reserved endings: 'ending_success' | 'ending_disaster' | 'ending_neutral'.

feedback.description: Witty one-liner shown below the story text after the choice is made.
